plugins.name: personal-tools
plugins.description: My personal Claude Code slash commands and subagents.

plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: An autonomous dev loop (/orchestrate fans out parallel issue-solving in isolated git worktrees, then per-issue my-review reviews each built slice and surfaces its findings), a single-task plan-build-review chain (/pipeline: models routed by complexity tier), plus a context watchdog that drives early /clear and /handoff as the window fills and auto-resumes the in-flight plan.
